name: Stripe
description: Manage payments, customers, subscriptions, and products via Stripe API
longDescription: Official Stripe MCP server for interacting with Stripe APIs. Create and manage customers, payments, subscriptions, products, prices, refunds, and more. Use Restricted API Keys to limit agent permissions to exactly what's needed. Supports both remote (mcp.stripe.com) and local (@stripe/mcp) deployment.
author: Stripe

apiKeyConfig.label: Stripe Secret Key (Restricted API Key recommended)
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Create a Restricted API Key at dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys with minimal required permissions

examplePrompts: Create a new customer with email john@example.com
Refund the last payment for customer cus_123
Create a checkout session for product prod_abc
Show me failed payments from last week
